---
title: package-naming
description: "Enforce conventional package names."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Enforce conventional package names. Strider default: lower-case letters and digits.

## Bad

```go
package http_util
```

## Good

```go
package httputil
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only package-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
